text:
1. Determine the time difference: US/Hawaii is UTC - 10, Australia/Sydney is UTC + 10, so the time difference is 20 hours.
2. Add the time difference to 21:00 (9 PM): 21:00 + 20 hours = 17:00 (next day).
3. Since we cross a day boundary, the date becomes September 24, 1118.
FINAL_ANSWER: 17:00 September 24, 1118
